calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Paul Perdue, Esq. for Plaintiff: United Commercial Bank.
Plaintiff's witness: L. Griffin, A.V.P./Secutiry Officer is also present, was sworn & examined.
EXH 1 - Copy of check #112093 for $36,697.49 ------- ID/EVID.
EXH 2 - Copy of Agreement and Release dtd. 3-8-03----ID/EVID.
EXH 3 - Copy of Letter to Mr. Robertson dtd. 3-6-03 -ID/EVID.
EXH 4 - Copy of Lien release dtd. 02-4-03 -----------ID/EVID.
EXH 5 - Copy of Letter to Mr. Lo dtd. 5-7-03 --------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants:Tony Lo Plumbing, Inc., and Robert Lo as follows:
Compensatory Damages of $36,697.49
Punitive Damages $40,000.00
Prejudgment interest $4,552.65
Costs of $364.50
For the total of $81,614.64.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits in open court.
